message:
feat(storage): Cx-first hot-path siblings — upsert_pane, record_event, shutdown (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue tick 114's storage cx-first sweep with three more
high-leverage hot-path entry points. A callsite scan ranked the
non-shutdown business methods by external call count; the top three
are covered here (29 + 8 + 110 callsites respectively).

1. `StorageHandle::upsert_pane_with_cx(cx, pane)` — the hot-path
   pane-discovery write (29+ external call sites). Pre-flight gate
   lets observation loops propagate caller cancellation into the
   write pipeline.

2. `StorageHandle::record_event_with_cx(cx, event)` — the hot-path
   pattern-detection write. Cx-driven detection pipelines can bail
   before enqueuing on the writer channel.

3. `StorageHandle::shutdown_with_cx(cx)` — matches the
   `WatchdogHandle::join_with_cx` pattern. Unconditionally enqueues
   the shutdown command (writer thread always gets a chance to
   drain), then awaits the ack + thread join only if the cx is not
   cancelled. Cancelled parent scopes bail fast; a subsequent
   `shutdown` / `shutdown_with_cx(fresh_cx)` will still drive the
   remaining thread join since writer_handle is left in place when
   skipped.

Legacy `upsert_pane` / `record_event` / `shutdown` preserved
unchanged.

Three regression tests:
- `storage_upsert_pane_with_cx_succeeds_on_fresh_cx` — fresh cx
  inserts the pane (verified via get_panes readback).
- `storage_upsert_pane_with_precancelled_cx_skips_enqueue` —
  pre-cancelled cx returns error AND the pane is NOT queryable
  (observable invariant: cancelled writes never reach the DB).
- `storage_shutdown_with_cx_fresh_cx_full_shutdown` — fresh cx
  completes the shutdown including writer thread join, no leaks.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 476/476
storage tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
